markdown:
#  Unlock a Signed Unconditional Lien Waiver as an Invoice Contact 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
##  Background 
Procore Pay protects signees by automatically locking signed unconditional lien waivers. With Procore Pay, your signed lien waiver is only unlocked and available to the general contractor after you receive the invoice payment in full. However, you can unlock a lien waiver at any time. Because signing an unconditional lien waiver releases your lien rights, it is recommended that you only unlock the lien waiver after getting paid. If you decide to unlock a signed unconditional lien waiver before you receive payment, you do so at your own risk.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To unlock a signed, unconditional lien waiver,_ 'Read Only' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool and you must be assigned as 'Invoice Contact' on the commitment.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * You must submit your invoice before the billing period's 'Due Date'.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Sign Lien Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/payee-user-guide/sign-lien-waivers)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Commitments** tool.
  2. Locate the contract for the invoice with the signed unconditional lien waiver. Then click its **Number** link to open it.
  3. In the commitment, click the **Invoices** tab.
  4. Locate the invoice with the signed unconditional lien waiver. Then click the **Invoice #** link to open it.
  5. In the invoice's General tab, scroll down to the **Lien Waivers** card.
  6. _Optional._ To unlock the lien waiver, click **Unlock**. This button is only visible to the Invoice Contact.  
  
![Unlock Signed Unconditional Lien Waiver](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/df90753931e83e1601ce4f36c2794b81/02084294e5104c9bcfc449ee1bf7fcfa/unlock-signed-unconditional-lien-waiver.png?fm=webp)An **Unlock Unconditional Lien Waiver?** message appears. 
#####  Warning
Unlocking an unconditional lien waiver before receiving payment releases your lien rights. Ensure that you want to proceed with this action before clicking the Unlock button. This action cannot be undone.
![Unlock Unconditional Lien Waivers](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/62e2807a000588967c6e9914d10aff32/71d6cb85ddf0da0da5acbb624f6407e0/unlock-unconditional-lien-waivers.png?fm=webp)
  7. If you are sure you want to proceed with this action, click **Unlock**.   
A GREEN banner appears to confirm the unlock action. The GRAY banner updates with the message below.   
  
![Manually Unlocked Lien Waiver](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d5c964cca287a5c49cf439795f28fef6/74f432b5ae56d29fb9166295a00b997e/manually-unlocked-lien-waiver.png?fm=webp)


##  Next Steps 
  * [Review a Subcontractor Invoice as an Invoice Administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/review--approve-invoices)


## See Also
  * [Sign Lien Waivers on Project Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/sign-lien-waivers-on-project-invoices)
  * [When does Procore Pay send email notifications?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-when-does-procore-pay-send-email-notifications)
  * [Send a Request to Unlock a Signed Unconditional Lien Waiver](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/send-a-request-to-unlock-a-signed-unconditional-lien-waiver)


An _Invoice Contact_ is a person who ensures that an invoice is submitted to an upstream contractor for payment. In Procore, an invoice contact is always an employee of the designated 'Contract Company' on a purchase order or subcontract. The contract company is the party responsible for performing work and/or supplying materials for a project. For customers in the United States using Procore's Progress Billings tool, this term is synonymous with progress billing contact.
title: Unlock a Signed Unconditional Lien Waiver as an Invoice Contact
description: How to unlock a signed unconditional lien waiver on a project invoice as an invoice contact.
